name: JOHN WICK
description:
The best hitman and assassin in the world. Perhaps the finest partner in crime too.

Hi, lovely.

It's me again, the author of this bot. I rewrote the first message because what I wrote a long time ago made me physically cringe LOL

I'll probably tweak this bot some more (but only if I find the motivation for it and ideas for lore). Maybe I'll drop another John Wick bot, maybe not. If you have any requests, hit me with them. I don't promise to deliver tho, I'm sorry 💔

Alright, back to not doing anything for a billion years or something.

See ya LOL
